summary: Turning fragmented knowledge into one simple system Discussion | Link
content: DocuSmart AI lets you search all your internal documents using plain English — across Google Drive, SharePoint, Dropbox and more — from one place. No migration, no reorganising, no training required. Just ask a question and get the answer. Built for nonprofits and SMEs who are drowning in documents spread across too many systems. We're looking for early adopters, if document chaos costs your team time, we'd love to hear from you.
chineseSummary: 将碎片化的知识变成一个简单的系统 讨论 |关联
chineseContent: DocuSmart AI 可让您使用简单的英语从一个地方搜索所有内部文档 - 跨 Google Drive、SharePoint、Dropbox 等。无需迁移、无需重组、无需培训。只需提出问题即可得到答案。专为那些淹没在分布在太多系统中的文档中的非营利组织和中小企业而构建。我们正在寻找早期采用者，如果文档混乱浪费了您团队的时间，我们很乐意听取您的意见。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
